mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(APPVERSION) >= #{appversion} THEN 'ERROR' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS VERSION_CHK FROM TWORK_INFO_APP_DOWN WHERE APPDOWN_YN = 'Y'
SELECT APPVERSION ,FILENM ,FILEPATH FROM ( SELECT * FROM TWORK_INFO_APP_DOWN WHERE APPDOWN_YN = 'Y' AND EQTYPE = #{eqtype} ORDER BY UPDATEDATE DESC ) AS sub_1 LIMIT 1
